leads.outreach_angle: Foundry Labs is in a hiring surge — 6 open senior eng roles plus a freshly closed Series B. Priya is scaling an engineering org fast and the tools-and-process questions are acute right now.
leads.research_notes: Foundry Labs raised $22M Series B in January 2026. Their open-source project 'Launchpad' crossed 10K GitHub stars in March. Currently hiring 6 senior backend engineers and 1 engineering manager — org scaling is the dominant challenge.

leads.outreach_angle: Daniel posted publicly about Kubernetes migration headaches last week — this is a self-reported pain point, not inferred. The timing for a relevant conversation is almost ideal.
leads.research_notes: Orbit Systems (130 employees, Series B) is mid-migration to a Kubernetes-native architecture. VP Engineering Daniel Ferreira posted on LinkedIn on March 21, 2026 about 'the hidden cost of K8s migrations' — confirming active infrastructure pain.

leads.outreach_angle: Monica started at Crestline 45 days ago and is in the middle of a microservices replatform — classic 'new VP evaluating the full stack' window before buying decisions lock in.
leads.research_notes: Crestline Software (Series C, 200 employees) hired Monica Travers as VP of Engineering in February 2026. Company is mid-replatform from a monolithic Java app to microservices. New engineering leaders typically do a full-stack audit in their first 60-90 days.

leads.outreach_angle: New CTO Aaron Lim joined from Databricks 60 days ago and is expanding the data pipeline product — he brings high standards and will be making tooling decisions quickly to establish his technical direction.
leads.research_notes: Beacon Data (Series A, 65 employees) hired Aaron Lim as CTO from Databricks in January 2026. Product expansion into real-time data pipelines announced February 2026. Note: direct VP Engineering title not yet filled — CTO is the functional decision-maker.

leads.outreach_angle: Tamara published a detailed article on their build system overhaul — she's clearly thinking deeply about developer productivity tooling and is a practitioner willing to engage on technical substance.
leads.research_notes: CloudBurst (Series A, 58 employees) VP Engineering Tamara Holt published 'How We Cut Our Build Times by 60%' on March 18, 2026 — signals active investment in developer tooling and a leader who engages publicly on the topic.
